SEARCH
Package org.javalabs.jpa.entity

Class JpaEntity

java.lang.Object
org.javalabs.jpa.entity.JpaEntity
public final class JpaEntity extends Object
Represents metadata for a JPA entity.

Contains information about entity name, table mapping, fields, relationships, and associated annotations.

Author:
Sudiptasish Chanda
